emails.subject: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: DINNER w/ Keith H. Pat Are we doing dinner with Keith Tuesday? Jim

emails.subject: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H. I didn't know/remember you were here. They are still closed, but I'll see if I can reach him. Another option: we're sponsoring this Alliance to Save Energy dinner that night and we still have room at our table, if Keith and you want to go. Pataki gets an award. It should be an ok time. I'll try to raise him and let you know. When do you get in? Pat To: Shortridge, Pat

emails.subject: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: This evening and stay until Wed pm. Jim To: Steffes, James D.

emails.subject: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: By the way, the dinner we're sponsoring is Wed, not Tuesday. I don't think I can do dinner on Tuesday. I have to provide airport shuttle service for my sister-in-law who's getting married Sat. To: Shortridge, Pat

emails.subject: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: Ok. I may call Keith anyway. Jim To: Steffes, James D.

emails.subject: RE: DINNER w/ Keith H.
emails.body: Good idea. I'll let you know if I end up being available. To: Shortridge, Pat
